page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external network storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core performance ranking in the top 25%. Multi-core CPU performance, PassMark CPU scores, and cryptographic operations fall within the average range. Memory performance shows a distinct tradeoff: while cached small-block read bandwidth is average at 607.86 GB/sec, large-block uncached read bandwidth is weak, performing in the bottom 25% at 37.19 GB/sec.

This hardware profile is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. Appropriate use cases include in-memory databases, caching layers such as Redis, and general-purpose database operations, where the 8:1 RAM-to-vCPU ratio and strong single-core execution provide balanced resource density.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.2xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high resource density of 8.0 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and providing a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Benchmark data reveals strong single-core CPU performance, alongside average multi-core and cryptographic capabilities. However, a key tradeoff is its uncached large-block memory read bandwidth, which performs in the bottom 25%. This server is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, Redis caching layers, and structured database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 8 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for in-memory databases and caching.
